title: Phase 2 node board and member API

features.title: Node Board And Member API
features.description: Implement the node board and member REST API for the Web Collaboration Beta (F2-04). Adds the six documented endpoints in docs/specs/interface_spec.md § 3.8: list, create, detail, update, add member, remove member. Reuses the F2-02 actor helper, F2-03 service/repository patterns, the existing canReadNodeBoard / canManageNodeBoard / canManageNodeBoardMembers authorization helpers, and the runWithAudit transaction wrapper. Every lifecycle write produces one audit entry and one realtime event inside a single transaction; failure rolls back the lifecycle write.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/goal-spaces/:goalSpaceId/node-boards returns 200 with the documented list shape; initiator sees all boards, members see only their own.
GET /api/v1/goal-spaces/:goalSpaceId/node-boards returns 401 without a session and 403 when the actor has no access to the goal space.

POST /api/v1/goal-spaces/:goalSpaceId/node-boards returns 201 with NodeBoardResponse for the initiator, 403 for a non-initiator, 400 when key or name is missing or non-string, and 409 STATE_CONFLICT when the key already exists in the goal space.
GET /api/v1/node-boards/:id returns 200 with NodeBoardResponse for a readable board, 404 for a missing board, and 403 for a non-member non-initiator.
PATCH /api/v1/node-boards/:id returns 200 with the updated NodeBoardResponse for the initiator, 403 for non-initiator, 404 for missing, and 422 VALIDATION_ERROR for an invalid status value.

POST /api/v1/node-boards/:id/members returns 201 with the added NodeBoardMemberResponse, 400 when user_id or role is missing, 403 for non-initiator, 404 for missing board, and 409 STATE_CONFLICT when the user is already an active member.

DELETE /api/v1/node-boards/:id/members/:userId returns 204 for the initiator (soft remove), 403 for non-initiator, 404 for missing board or user, and is idempotent on a member that is already removed; re-adding a previously removed member returns 201.
Every lifecycle write persists exactly one audit_entries row and one realtime_events row inside a single transaction; failure rolls back the lifecycle write.
apps/web/src/lib/api/actor.ts is used by every F2-04 route (no F2-02 / F2-03 helper duplication).
pnpm check passes or environment-only warnings are explicitly recorded.
No files outside the F2-04 file set or unrelated prior changes are modified.
test_needs: Write failing node board API contract tests first
Cover membership matrix: initiator, member, non-member, cross goal space
Cover lifecycle write paths: create, update, add member, remove member
Cover audit_entries and realtime_events write paths per lifecycle call
Run targeted node board + authorization tests
definition_of_done: Required verification items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
